scene: 3x3 storyboard grid for Drown In This River — Episode 02 woods run, breath pause, lip sync opening

reference_images.extract: exact face, skin tone, gold hoop earrings, thin gold necklace, sun-yellow sleeveless high-low dress, wet dark wavy hair length, barefoot, athletic build
reference_images.apply_to: Nia in panels 2 through 9 — same woman every panel

blend_instructions: Use Image 1 only for character identity. Do not copy Image 1 composition or background — invent new forest frames per panel.

global_style.camera: ARRI Alexa 65, Cooke anamorphic oval bokeh

color_grade.tone: deep teal storm woods vs warm gold dress

global_style.weather: night, torrential rain, uphill Pacific Northwest dense forest
global_style.lighting: mostly dark; lightning flashes and one restrained rim light on face in later panels

panels.subject: environment only
panels.description: Wide steep muddy uphill path through towering dark trunks, rain sheets, oppressive scale, no person visible

panels.subject: Nia running
panels.description: Profile tracking still — sprinting uphill left-to-right, barefoot splashing mud, yellow dress trailing, trees motion-blur past, handheld energy

panels.subject: bare feet
panels.description: Low angle — bare feet pounding roots and puddle, soaked dress hem, lightning flash reflecting in water

panels.subject: lightning silhouette
panels.description: Full-body profile mid-stride between trunks, mostly silhouette, yellow dress edge-lit white, rain frozen in flash

panels.subject: stop
panels.description: Palm slams mossy trunk, knees bent, head down, shoulders heaving, rain on back, panicked survival posture

panels.subject: gasp close-up
panels.description: Close face — mouth open gasping, rain on cheeks, frightened eyes, gold hoops faint glint, mostly dark frame

panels.subject: lightning wide
panels.description: Forest wide — bolt illuminates entire tree line one instant, Nia small holding trunk

panels.subject: face light
panels.description: Subtle storm-born rim light on face and collarbones only; rest deep teal shadow; intimate not cheesy religious god-ray

panels.subject: lip sync
panels.description: Medium close singing toward camera, wet hair on temples, exhausted, lyric moment Lost in the darkness, dress saturated, rain continuing

must_include: same Nia from Image 1 in every panel that shows her
consistent yellow dress and wet hair across panels
must_avoid: city skyline or flood ocean wide
different faces or outfits between panels
